creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
felt didn't look for Xaw3d in the correct place. patch-ab was wrong,
so I replaced it with a new patch to support Xaw3d.

Fix: 

new patch-ab available in:
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/felt-ab.gz
How-To-Repeat: Hope I got it right; I've never seen Xaw3d.
Please also add a dependency to Xaw3d
